subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who, O my God, hast created, fashioned and brought into being, through the outpouring of Thy bounty and the showers of Thy clouds of mercy, all created things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انت الذی یا الهی خلقت و برئت و ذرئت بفیض جودک و صوب غمام رحمتک حقائق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation, @eulogies; reminiscences, @soul; spirit after death
